CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-21-2021 Continued To Apr-13-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Default And Default Prove Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-14-2021 Continued To Mar-01-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendant Clarisa M. Garcia.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:04 a.m.

Adam Brumage, Esq. appeared for plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A.
Mariana Echeverria-Licona, Associate Vendor Management Analyst for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Mr. Brumage and Ms. Echeverria-Licona appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
Defaulted defendant Clarisa M. Garcia was present in pro per.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Common Counts was filed on June 7, 2021, and personally served on defendant Clarisa M. Garcia on August 19, 2021.
Default as to defendant Clarisa M. Garcia was entered on October 4, 2021.
No DOE defendants named in plaintiff's complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court GRANTS defendant Clarisa M. Garcia's request for a continuance in order for her (Ms. Garcia) to file a motion to set-aside the default in Department 302. The Court informs Ms. Garcia that this matter shall proceed on March 1st for default prove-up hearing if her request to set-aside the default has not been filed and ruled upon.

Matter is CONTINUED to Tuesday, March 1, 2022 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 514 for further Default Prove-Up Hearing, if necessary. Notice of continued hearing is not required.

Proceedings concluded at 10:15 a.m.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-21-2021 Continued To Jan-12-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
